versions.version_description: Arranged chords to make easier for a beginner.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This song is in standard tuning EADGBe, similar to other versions on here, however 
I use no capo for this version, I think it sounds like a bit more bass for rapping the song. 

The chords are very easy, and simple to play.

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch] 

They keep the same rhythm, just rinse and repeat, have fun!

[tab]I don't use the pinky finger on the B7, its more of a modified [ch]B7[/ch] chord. Simply 
switching my two fingers from the Am to B7* transition, while keeping the pinky [/tab]
anchored on the third string (G).


[Verse 1]

[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch] 
Y'all act like you never seen a white person before[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Jaws all on the floor like Pam and Tommy just burst in the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
and started whoopin her ass worse than before[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B7[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch] 
they were first divorced, throwin her over furniture (Ahh!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
It's the return of the... "Ah, wait, no way, you're kidding,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
he didn't just say what I think he did, did he?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And Dr. Dre said... nothing you idiots![/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Dr. Dre's dead, he's locked in my basement! (Ha-ha!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Feminist women love Eminem[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B7[/ch]
chigga chigga chigga[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
"Slim Shady, I'm sick of him look at him, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Walkin' around grabbin' his you-know-what[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Flippin the you-know-who," "Yeah, but he's so cute though!"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, I probably got a couple of screws up in my head loose[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
But no worse, than what's goin on in your parents' bedrooms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]B7[/ch] 
Sometimes, I wanna get on TV and just let loose, but can't[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
but it's cool for Tom Green to hump a dead moose[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]   
"My bum is on your lips, my bum is on your lips"[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
And if I'm lucky, you might just give it a little kiss[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]  
And that's the message that we deliver to little kids[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch] 
And expect them not to know what a woman's clitoris is[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch] 
Of course they gonna know what intercourse is[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]B7[/ch]
By the time they hit fourth grade[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
They got the Discovery Channel don't they?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]B7[/ch]
"We ain't nothing but mammals.." Well, some of us cannibals[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
who cut other people open like cantaloupes [SLURP][/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]  
But if we can hump dead animals and antelopes[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
then there's no reason that a man and another man can't elope[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
[*EWWW!*] But if you feel like I feel, I got the antidote[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Women wave your pantyhose, sing the chorus and it goes[/tab]


[Chorus: Eminem (repeat x2)]
 
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause I'm Slim Shady, yes I'm the real Shady[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
All you other Slim Shadys are just imitating[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
So won't the real Slim Shady please stand up,[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
please stand up, please stand up?[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Will Smith don't gotta cuss in his raps to sell his records;[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
well I do, so fuck him and fuck you too![/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You think I give a damn about a Grammy?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
Half of you critics can't even stomach me, let alone stand me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
"But Slim, what if you win, wouldn't it be weird?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Why? So you guys could just lie to get me here?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
So you can, sit me here next to Britney Spears?[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Shit, Christina Aguilera better switch me chairs[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
so I can sit next to Carson Daly and Fred Durst[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
and hear 'em argue over who she gave head to first[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
You little bitch, put me on blast on MTV[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
"Yeah, he's cute, but I think he's married to Kim, hee-hee!"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
I should download her audio on MP3[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
and show the whole world how you gave Eminem VD [AHHH!][/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]B7[/ch]
I'm sick of you little girl and boy groups, all you do is annoy me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
so I have been sent here to destroy you [bzzzt][/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]                
And there's a million of us just like me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
who cuss like me; who just don't give a fuck like me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
who dress like me; walk, talk and act like me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
and just might be the next best thing but not quite me![/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm like a head trip to listen to, cause I'm only givin you[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                                    [ch]Em[/ch]
things you joke about with your friends inside your living room[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
The only difference is I got the balls to say it[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
in front of y'all and I don't gotta be false or sugarcoated at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
I just get on the mic and spit it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B7[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
and whether you like to admit it [*ERR*] I just shit it[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
better than ninety percent of you rappers out can[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
Then you wonder how can kids eat up these albums like valiums[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
It's funny; cause at the rate I'm goin when I'm thirty[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
I'll be the only person in the nursin home flirting[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Pinchin nurses asses when I'm jackin off with Jergens[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
And I'm jerkin but this whole bag of Viagra isn't working[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
And every single person is a Slim Shady lurkin[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
He could be workin at Burger King, spittin on your onion rings[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch] 
[*HACH*] Or in the parkin lot, circling[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B7[/ch]
Screaming "I don't give a fuck!"[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
with his windows down and his system up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
So, will the real Shady please stand up?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
And put one of those fingers on each hand up?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
And be proud to be outta your mind and outta control[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B7[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
and one more time, loud as you can, how does it go?[/tab]

[Chorus] (x4) 

Ha ha
Guess there's a Slim Shady in all of us
Fuck it, let's all stand up
